M. Lawrence Lallande, Esq. (562.436.8800; la2@lallandelaw.com) for Plaintiff.
James Hannawalt, Esq. (415.554.3913; james.hannawalt@sfcityatt.org) Deputy City Attorney for Defendants.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and MALCOLM MABREY's Motion For Order Compelling Mental Examination Neuropsychological Examination With Dr. William Hooker is continued for further hearing on February 10, 2022 at 3:30p.m. via Dept 301/Discovery zoom link.
